guides.name: EASE Essentials
guides.description: Core cross-disciplinary manuscript checks inspired by EASE author guidance.

items.label: Informative title
items.requirement: The manuscript has a clear title that can be used as source-grounded front matter.

items.label: Authors and affiliations
items.requirement: Author names and affiliation metadata are available in the annotated front matter.

items.label: Abstract available
items.requirement: An abstract or summary is identified and available for later checks.

items.label: Keywords
items.requirement: Keywords are available when the manuscript provides a keyword list.

items.label: Article text
items.requirement: Main article sections are identified for guideline checks and reports.

items.label: Reference list
items.requirement: Reference-list entries are identified with source anchors.

items.label: Tables and figures
items.requirement: Tables and figures are annotated with source anchors when present.

items.label: Source quotes
items.requirement: Source-grounded quote anchors are available for jump links.
